How We Work

Our Work Process

01
🔍

Inspection

Every machine undergoes a 5-step inspection — engine, hydraulics, structure, working test, and full video report.

02
📦

Loading

Machines are cleaned, prepared, and loaded into containers or flat-racks. Photos and loading video provided.

03
🚢

Shipping

Full export documentation, customs clearance, and real-time shipment tracking. We handle the entire process.

04
🤝

Client Delivery

Machine arrives at your port. We provide all required documents and support after-delivery questions.

100%
Inspected Before Shipment
Our Process

Inspection Process

Every machine goes through 5 steps before we confirm availability to buyers.

01

Engine Performance Test

Start test, idle and load performance, oil pressure and smoke analysis.

02

Hydraulic System Inspection

All cylinders, pumps, hoses and control valves tested under load.

03

Working Condition Test

Full operation test — digging, lifting, grading or compaction as applicable.

04

Leakage & Structure Check

Frame, boom, undercarriage, pins and bushings physically checked.

05

Video Report Before Shipment

Full video sent to buyer before loading. What you approve is what ships.

Export Cases

Shipping Cases

🌎 South America

CAT 320D to South America

Full inspection, container loading and export documentation completed on time.
🌍 Africa

SDLG 956 to Africa

3 units shipped together via RORO. Reduced freight cost with full tracking.
🌏 Middle East

CAT 140H to Middle East

Graders and rollers on flat-rack containers with full customs documents.

Years Export
